name: Capital One Platinum Credit Card

other_benefits: Access to CreditWise® credit monitoring tool

sources.notes: Forbes review noting no rewards, no signup bonus, basic credit building card
NerdWallet listing 6 benefits: qualify with average credit, no annual fee, path to higher credit limit, no foreign transaction fees, choose your due date

notes: The most basic Capital One card. No rewards, no sign-up bonus, no annual fee. Value comes purely from credit-building: accessible to those with fair/average credit, no foreign transaction fees, and path to credit limit increases after 6 months. No purchase protections, no travel benefits. Not recommended for anyone who can qualify for a rewards card. Best use: first credit card to establish credit history.
